ast.target: 标题编号插件：正在应用标题编号更改：

ast.target: 标题编号插件：正在应用目录更改：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Number Headings Plugin: Automatically numbered document
ast.target: 标题编号插件：已自动编号文档

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If selected, numbering will not be applied to the top heading level.
ast.target: 若选中，将不会对最高级标题应用编号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: First heading level to number.
ast.target: 要编号的第一个标题级别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Start numbering the first heading level from this value.
ast.target: 从此值开始为第一个标题级别编号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum heading level to number.
ast.target: 要编号的最大标题级别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defines the numbering style for level one headings. Valid values are 1 (for numbers) or A (for capital letters) or I (for Roman numerals).
ast.target: 定义一级标题的编号样式。有效值为 1（数字）、A（大写字母）或 I（罗马数字）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defines the numbering style for headings below level one. Valid values are 1 (for numbers) or A (for capital letters) or I (for Roman numerals).
ast.target: 定义一级以下标题的编号样式。有效值为 1（数字）、A（大写字母）或 I（罗马数字）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turns on automatic numbering of documents.
ast.target: 开启文档自动编号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Anchor which labels the header where a table of contents should be inserted. The anchor should be added at the end of a header. For example, ^toc.
ast.target: 用于标记应插入目录的标题的锚点。该锚点应添加在标题末尾。例如，^toc。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Anchor which labels the headers that should not be numbered. The anchor should be added at the end of a header. For example, ^skipped.
ast.target: 用于标记不应编号的标题的锚点。该锚点应添加在标题末尾。例如，^skipped。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Skip top heading level
ast.target: 跳过最高标题级别

ast.name: setName
ast.source: First heading level
ast.target: 第一标题级别

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Start numbering at
ast.target: 编号起始于

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Maximum heading level
ast.target: 最大标题级别

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Style for level 1 headings
ast.target: 1级标题样式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Style for lower level headings (below level 1)
ast.target: 低级别标题样式（1级以下）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatic numbering
ast.target: 自动编号

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Separator style
ast.target: 分隔符样式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Table of Contents Anchor
ast.target: 目录锚点

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Skip Headings Anchor
ast.target: 跳过标题锚点

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Number Headings - Successfully Completed
ast.target: 标题编号 - 已成功完成

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Yes, save settings in document
ast.target: 是，将设置保存到文档中

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Yes, save settings in document, and automatically number
ast.target: 是，将设置保存到文档中，并自动编号

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Skip top heading level
ast.target: 跳过最高级标题

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Turn on automatic numbering
ast.target: 开启自动编号

ast.name: message
ast.source:
Successfully updated all heading numbers in the document, using the settings below. 
      See settings panel to change how headings are numbered, or use front matter
      (see settings panel).
ast.target:
已使用以下设置成功更新文档中所有标题编号。
      请在设置面板中更改标题编号方式，或使用 front matter
      （见设置面板）。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Number all headings in document (and show options)
ast.target: 为文档中所有标题编号（并显示选项）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Number all headings in document
ast.target: 为文档中所有标题编号

ast.name: name
ast.source: Save settings to front matter
ast.target: 将设置保存到前置元数据

ast.name: text
ast.source: Do you want to save these settings in the document's front matter?
ast.target: 是否要将这些设置保存到文档的前置元数据中？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Number Headings - Settings
ast.target: 标题编号 - 设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: To add numbering to your document, bring up the command window (on Mac, type CMD+P), and then type "Number Headings" to see a list of available commands.
ast.target: 要为文档添加编号，请打开命令窗口（在 Mac 上按 CMD+P），然后输入“Number Headings”以查看可用命令列表。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If the document has front matter defined with the below settings, the project-wide settings defined on this screen will be ignored. You can define front matter like this:
ast.target: 如果文档在前置元数据中使用以下设置进行定义，则此屏幕上的项目范围设置将被忽略。你可以这样定义前置元数据：

ast.name: text
ast.source:
---
    alias:
    - Example Alias
    tags:
    - example-tag
    number headings: first-level 1, start-at 2, max 6, 1.1, auto, contents ^toc
    ---
ast.target:
---
    alias:
    - Example Alias
    tags:
    - example-tag
    number headings: first-level 1, start-at 2, max 6, 1.1, auto, contents ^toc
    ---

ast.name: text
ast.source:
The 'number headings' front matter key is used to store numbering settings specific to the file. There are four possible options
      in the value to the right of the colon, separated by commas.
ast.target:
“number headings”前置元数据键用于存储该文件特定的编号设置。冒号右侧的值中有四种可选项，
      以逗号分隔。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Automatic numbering
ast.target: 自动编号

ast.name: text
ast.source: : If 'auto' appears, the document will be automatically numbered.
ast.target: : 如果出现“auto”，文档将自动编号。

ast.name: text
ast.source: First level to number
ast.target: 编号起始级别

ast.name: text
ast.source: : If 'first-level 2' appears, the numbering will start at the second level
ast.target: : 如果出现“first-level 2”，编号将从第二级开始

ast.name: text
ast.source: Start numbering first heading at
ast.target: 第一个标题编号起始于

ast.name: text
ast.source: : If 'start-at C' appears, the numbering of the first level will start at C, instead of A
ast.target: : 如果出现“start-at C”，第一级的编号将从 C 开始，而不是 A

ast.name: text
ast.source: Maximum level to number
ast.target: 编号的最大级别

ast.name: text
ast.source: : If 'max 6' appears, the headings above level 6 will be skipped.
ast.target: : 如果出现“max 6”，将跳过高于 6 级的标题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Table of contents anchor
ast.target: 目录锚点

ast.name: text
ast.source: : If 'contents ^toc' appears, the heading that ends with the anchor ^toc will have a table of contents inserted beneath it.
ast.target: : 如果出现“contents ^toc”，以锚点 ^toc 结尾的标题下方将插入目录。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Skip headings anchor
ast.target: 跳过标题锚点

ast.name: text
ast.source: : If 'skip ^skipped' appears, the heading that ends with the anchor ^skipped will not be numbered.
ast.target: : 如果出现“skip ^skipped”，以锚点 ^skipped 结尾的标题将不编号。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Numbering style
ast.target: 编号样式

ast.name: text
ast.source: For example, '1.1' means both top level and other headings will be numbered starting from '1'.
ast.target: 例如，'1.1' 表示一级标题和其他级别标题都将从 '1' 开始编号。

ast.name: text
ast.source: For example, 'A.1' means top level headings will be numbered starting from 'A'.
ast.target: 例如，'A.1' 表示一级标题将从 'A' 开始编号。

ast.name: text
ast.source: For example, '_.A.1' means top level headings will NOT be numbered, but the next levels will be numbered with letters and numbers.
ast.target: 例如，'_.A.1' 表示一级标题不编号，但后续级别将用字母和数字编号。

ast.name: text
ast.source: For example, '1.1:' means headings will look like '## 2.4: Example Heading'
ast.target: 例如，'1.1:' 表示标题将显示为 '## 2.4: Example Heading'

ast.name: text
ast.source: For example, 'A.1-' means headings will look like '## B.5- Example Heading'
ast.target: 例如，'A.1-' 表示标题将显示为 '## B.5- Example Heading'

ast.name: text
ast.source: For example, 'I.A —' means headings will look like '## IV.A — Example Heading' (with Roman numerals)
ast.target: 例如，'I.A —' 表示标题将显示为 '## IV.A — Example Heading'（使用罗马数字）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Numbering off
ast.target: 编号关闭

ast.name: text
ast.source: : If 'off' appears, the document will not be numbered.
ast.target: : 如果出现 'off'，文档将不会编号。
